## Summary

Workbench layout fixes for vertical space and visual consistency:

1. **Reset Queue button** — resized to match TrustedPath/Final Review button style, positioned to the left of TrustedPath in the same header row
2. **Title descender clipping** — "g" letters no longer cut off (increased header min-height + added leading-6)
3. **Search Queue / pill layout** — "Search Queue" label on left, queue counter pill on right with extra spacing after "Queue"
4. **Vertical space savings** — "DIAGNOSIS & GUARDRAILS" label + severity/criterion/scope tags moved into a compact fixed header above the task title. Task title gets its own separated row. Diagnostic details (Symptom, Cause, Fix, etc.) remain in the scrollable content below without a duplicate label.

## Scope

- `components/revision/ResetQueueButton.tsx` — button styling + confirmation dropdown matching TrustedPath pattern
- `app/workbench-v2/page.tsx` — Reset Queue positioning (right-[640px] top-[78px])
- `components/revision/ReviseCockpitClientCompactV3.tsx` — header restructure, title clipping, search/pill layout

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

None — pure UI layout changes.
